mapper.select:
select /* @SQLID=FCT017#SQL001 */ * from (select A.ACCEPTANCE_CD1 as acceptanceCd1, B.CODE_2 as code2BondingAcceptanceCd1, B.NAME as nameBondingAcceptanceCd1, A.ACCEPTANCE_CD2 as acceptanceCd2, B.CODE_2 as code2BondingAcceptanceCd2, B.NAME as nameBondingAcceptanceCd2, A.ACCEPTANCE_CD3 as acceptanceCd3, B.CODE_2 as code2BondingAcceptanceCd3, B.NAME as nameBondingAcceptanceCd3 from INT_TRUST_ATTRIBUTE A left join (
) B on A.ACCEPTANCE_CD1 = B.CODE_1 or A.ACCEPTANCE_CD2 = B.CODE_1 or A.ACCEPTANCE_CD3 = B.CODE_1 where #{nriCd} = substr(A.BR_SER_NO,2,4) || ' ' || substr(A.PECULIAR_CD,4,2) order by A.SET_DATE desc ) where rownum=1
mapper.sql: select /* @SQLID=FCT017#SQL001_2 */ CODE_1, CODE_2, NAME from M_CODE where CODE_TYPE = '60' and START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') and END_DATE >= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD')
mapper.select:
select /* @SQLID=FCT017#SQL002 */ count(1) from DOCUMENT_ACCEPTANCE_DATA A left join (
) B on A.BUTEN_CD = B.BUTEN_CD and A.KOUZA_NO = B.KOUZA_NO where (( substr(A.BUTEN_CD,2,3) = #{butenCode} and TO_NUMBER(A.KOUZA_NO) = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber}) ) or ( substr(A.BUTEN_CD,2,3) = substr(B.OLD_BRANCH_NO,1,3) and TO_NUMBER(A.KOUZA_NO) = TO_NUMBER(B.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO) )) and A.NRI_CD = CONCAT('${brandCode}',' ') and A.SHORUI_CD = #{shoruiCd} and A.YUKO_KIGEN >= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD')
mapper.sql: select /* @SQLID=FCT017#SQL002_2 */ C.BUTEN_CD, C.KOUZA_NO, D.OLD_BRANCH_NO, D.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO from DOCUMENT_ACCEPTANCE_DATA C inner join CALLCENTER.CHANGE_ACCOUNT D on substr(C.BUTEN_CD,2,3) = substr(D.NEW_BRANCH_NO,1,3) and TO_NUMBER(C.KOUZA_NO) = TO_NUMBER(D.NEW_ACCOUNT_NO) where substr(C.BUTEN_CD,2,3) = #{butenCode} and TO_NUMBER(C.KOUZA_NO) = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber})
mapper.select:
select /* @SQLID=FCT017#SQL003 */ count(1) from DOCUMENT_ACCEPTANCE_DATA A left join (
) B on A.BUTEN_CD = B.BUTEN_CD and TO_NUMBER(A.KOUZA_NO) = TO_NUMBER(B.KOUZA_NO) where (( substr(A.BUTEN_CD,2,3) = #{butenCode} and TO_NUMBER(A.KOUZA_NO) = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber}) ) or ( substr(A.BUTEN_CD,2,3) = substr(B.OLD_BRANCH_NO,1,3) and TO_NUMBER(A.KOUZA_NO) = TO_NUMBER(B.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO) )) and A.SHORUI_CD = #{shoruiCd} and A.YUKO_KIGEN >= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD')
mapper.sql: select /* @SQLID=FCT017#SQL003_2 */ C.BUTEN_CD, C.KOUZA_NO, D.OLD_BRANCH_NO, D.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO from DOCUMENT_ACCEPTANCE_DATA C inner join CALLCENTER.CHANGE_ACCOUNT D on substr(C.BUTEN_CD,2,3) = substr(D.NEW_BRANCH_NO,1,3) and TO_NUMBER(C.KOUZA_NO) = TO_NUMBER(D.NEW_ACCOUNT_NO) where substr(C.BUTEN_CD,2,3) = #{butenCode} and TO_NUMBER(C.KOUZA_NO) = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber})
